name: Hoax.ai Link and Route Integrity Policy
governing_principle: A reference asset cannot scale until its routes and links are governed. No route without registry. No link without target. No sitemap without live eligibility.
route_rules: Every public route must exist in data/route-registry.json
Every route must have a unique route_id
Every route must have path, route_type, status, index_policy, canonical_url, sitemap eligibility, and deployment_status
Future routes must not appear in sitemap.xml
Blocked routes must not appear in public navigation
Planned routes must not appear as live routes
sitemap_rules: sitemap.xml may include only registered routes
sitemap.xml may include only sitemap-eligible routes
sitemap.xml may not include planned, blocked, future, draft, or internal_only routes
sitemap.xml must not contain placeholder URLs
sitemap.xml must not imply external deployment completion when deferred
Current sitemap may include homepage and exactly two controlled public reference pilot routes until further governance
canonical_rules: Each public route must have one canonical URL
Canonical must not point to future or unapproved route
Canonical must not imply deployment completion beyond deployment_status
Canonical policy remains consistent until external deployment gate passes
internal_link_rules: No internal link may point to missing route
No internal link may point to planned route unless internal documentation
No public navigation may contain future routes
No orphan public route after multi-route expansion
Indexable routes require internal linking policy
Governance markdown links should resolve to existing local files where practical
anchor_rules: Public HTML fragment links must target existing element IDs
Empty hash links prohibited unless explicitly justified
Navigation anchors resolve on same page or registered route
deployment_status_rules: Deployment-deferred status is not a validation failure
deployment_ready may not be set until deployment readiness gate passes
No DNS instruction through this policy
